scripts.prepack: sudo apt-get install -y build-essential cmake python3 python3-pip pkg-config libssl-dev libcurl4-openssl-dev libvulkan1 libvulkan-dev vulkan-tools glslc libshaderc1 spirv-tools vulkan-validationlayers mesa-vulkan-drivers && make configure && make release && mv build/release/extension/*/*_extension .
